---

# Mage Balance Reference

## Resource Profile
| Max Stamina | Max Mana | Stam Regen/s | Mana Regen/s |
|-------------|----------|--------------|--------------|
| 25 | 50 | 1.0 | 2.0 |

**Identity:** Mana-dominant. Large mana pool with high regen enables frequent casting. Stamina is secondary and limited. 1s channel/charge is standard for many abilities. Corruption, Intellect, Electrified, and Rifts are key class mechanics.

---

| Fireball | 15 | 5 | 12 | 10 | — | 160→240 fire | Active. +1 Corruption, 1s channel |
| Force Cloak | 5→15 | 5→1 | 20→15 | — | — | — | Active. Protect 1 + Shell 1 |
| Heat Rising | 15 | 0 | 15 | — | — | — | Active. +30→50% Fire dmg (10s); +2 Corruption |
| Hex Curse | 5 | 0 | 14 | — | — | 70→105 dark | Active. Hex: bonus dmg on basics (5s) |
| Intuition | — | — | — | — | — | — | Passive. +10→15 magical dmg; +0.3 regen <30 mana |
| Lightning Bolt | 10 | 0 | 7 | 7 line | — | 70 + 70→140 lightning | Active. Bonus if mana ≥30→40 pre-cast |
| Manabending | — | — | — | — | — | — | Passive. +10 magical dmg; +2→3 mana on neg status (1/sec) |
| Mana Blitz | 0 | 0 | 16 | — | — | — | Active. +30→50 magical damage (8s buff) |
| Mana Shell | 9 | 0 | 5 | — | — | — | Active. 4→6 shields [5s] |
| Mind Growth | — | — | — | — | — | — | Passive. Every 3 casts: +0.2→0.3 mana regen (perm) |
| Overflow | 0 | 0 | once | — | — | — | Active. Set mana to max; -0.3→0.1 mana regen perm |
| Sear | 15 | 0 | 13 | 6 | 4w×1h | 40→60 fire | Active. Piercing proj + 5→8 Burn |
| Slowing Orb | 5 | 0 | 15→12 | — | 3→5 | — | Active. Slowness II (3s) |
| Study | — | — | — | — | — | — | Passive. +2→3 Intellect on kill |
| Windcall | 0 | 15 | 10 | 5 cone | — | — | Active. -10→15 enemy dmg [5→7s] + knockback |

### Common Baselines
- Cost: 5–20 mana, 0–15 stamina
- Cooldown: 5–18s
- Direct damage: 60–250 (conditional bonuses can push higher)
- Mana efficiency: 7–16 dmg/mana
- Passives grant: +10–15 magical dmg or +0.2–0.3 regen stacking
- 1s channel/charge is standard implicit cost

### Uncommon Baselines
- Cost: 10–30 mana, 0–15 stamina
- Cooldown: 9–22s
- Direct damage: 100–360 (single target), 80–300 (AoE)
- Mana efficiency: 8–12 dmg/mana
- Many passives with "every 3 casts" scaling pattern
- Conditional bonuses (mana thresholds) add 50–100% damage

### Archetype Groups (Uncommon)
- **Fire/Corruption**: Arcane Blast, Engulf, Fireball II, Fireblast, Fire Bolt, Firewall, Flashfire, To Ashes, Torch, Wildfire
- **Lightning/Electrified**: Drain Lightning, Electrode, Electric Orb, Electrolysis, Eye of the Storm, Lightning Strike, Mana Arc, Storm
- **Earthen/Concussed**: Anchoring Earth II, Earthen Domain, Earthen Wall, Ground Lance, Head Trauma, Overgrowth, Splinterstone
- **Dark/Rift/Hex**: Collection Hex, Density Orb, Entropy, Growing Hex, Heartbeat, Hex Curse II
- **Mana Economy/Scaling**: Avatar State, Discharge, Mana Cloak, Mana Guard, Mind Blast, Mind Growth II, Mind Shell, Study II

| Soul Battery | 0 | 0 | 12 | — | 3 | 3×(125→190) lightning | Active. Shields from Electrified + 3 strikes |
| Voltaics | 70→50 | 0 | once | line | — | 65→100/2s lightning | Active. Auto-fires bolts; bonus at 20→15 Elec threshold |

### Rare Baselines
- Cost: 20–100 mana (wide range), 0–50 stamina
- Cooldown: 4–30s (many "once per fight" at high cost)
- Damage: 125–425 per cast
- Strong synergy requirements (Electrified threshold, Corruption stacks, Rift count)
- "Once per fight" abilities trade high upfront cost for permanent effects

## EPIC Abilities (7)

| Equipment | Mana | Stam | CD(s) | Effect (Base→Upgraded) | Type |
|-----------|------|------|-------|------------------------|------|
| Brilliance | — | — | — | Entropy (+3 Int/kill, Rift/4→3 kills) + Protect/Shell 2→3 on dmg type change | Passive |
| Convergence | — | — | — | Entropy + fires homing projectile on type change + 1→2 heal | Passive |
| I Am Atomic | — | — | — | Entropy + mana cost -20→30 + 3→5 max mana/kill + 20%/threshold dmg scaling | Passive |
| Power Overwhelming II | 100→80 | 15 | 40 | -20→30 mana costs + 2→3 CDR per ability + 4→6 shields per cast | Active |
| Toll of the Arcane | 130→100 | 15 | once | -50→70% mana cost multiplier; +3 Corruption | Active |
| Void Form | — | — | — | Per Rift: -15→25 mana cost + 2→4 CDR | Passive |
| Void Warden | 20+ | 0 | 0 | Nullify upgrade: Protect/Shell 3→5 + passive shields from Rift threshold | Active |

### Epic Pattern
- Predominantly passive/transformative
- Most combine 2+ rare-tier effects into one slot
- Entropy (Intellect + Rift generation on kill) is a common base
- Mana cost reduction engines are the defining epic mechanic

---

## Key Balance Patterns

### Cost Economy
- Mana-dominant: 5–30 mana per ability (50 max, 2.0 regen = 25s full regen)
- Stamina is rare cost (0–15), mainly for earthen/physical hybrid abilities
- "Once per fight" abilities cost 60–130 mana for permanent effects
- Corruption reduces costs: -3→5 per stack (key scaling mechanic)

### Mana Threshold Mechanics
- Many abilities gain bonus effects when mana is above a threshold (30, 40, 50, 60)
- This creates tension: cast to deal damage vs. hold mana for conditional bonuses
- Threshold bonuses typically double the base damage or add significant utility

### Damage Scaling by Rarity
| Rarity | Single-target | AoE (per cast) | DoT/Tick |
|--------|--------------|----------------|----------|
| Common | 60–250 | 80–160 | 40–60/tick |
| Uncommon | 100–360 | 80–300 | 50–90/tick |
| Rare | 125–425 | 175–375 | 65–100/2s |
| Epic | Passive/transformative | — | — |

### Upgrade Patterns
- Damage: +40–50%
- Mana cost: -25–35% (uncommon: 30→10, rare: 100→80)
- Status stacks: +50–67%
- Mana thresholds: lowered by 10 (50→40, 40→30)
- Regen scaling: +50% (0.2→0.3, 0.4→0.5)
- "Once per fight" abilities: reduced upfront cost
